prompt_queue.prompt: Space: local business. Generate one distinct, buildable website concept for a real-feeling neighborhood business that needs a presence on the web but does not run an online storefront as its core. Examples of valid sub-spaces: independent cafes and coffee bars, neighborhood bookstores, all-ages music venues, climbing gyms, makerspaces, tattoo and piercing studios, record stores, community theaters, dog daycares, board game cafes, hair salons or barbershops with a defined clientele, neighborhood restaurants with a strong identity. The concept should imply a content-shaped site: hours, location, about, services or menu highlights, events or calendar, gallery, contact. Stay inside local business; do not propose a national ecommerce brand and do not propose pure SaaS or pure publishing.
